title: rubus echincaulon
intro: Rubus echincaulon, also known as the Echin cory raspberry or raspberry with spiny calyx, is a species of raspberry native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rubus echincaulon include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus echincaulon include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
